title: palette update
last_update: Fixed: the update button's label in Settings > Updates was painted dark-gray-on-dark when the button is inactive (e.g. 'Not checked yet', 'Up to date'), which made it unreadable. It now uses the light gray 'dim' text color, so it reads clearly while still looking inactive. A test now measures the actual on-screen contrast so this can't regress. All tests pass and the whole-branch review found no problems. Ready for the owner to review and deploy.

log.m: Contrast fix implemented and green; whole-branch review clean (3 lenses, no findings).
